# AGENTS.md — Foreign Insight

## Project Overview

WebApp providing insights about nationalities in Spain (Source: Instituto Nacional de Estadistica).

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/secciones-nacionalidades](https://github.com/GeiserX/secciones-nacionalidades)
- **Language:** R
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
